highlights: Migrated 300+ backend APIs from Express.js with Firestore to a scalable NestJS architecture with MongoDB.
Redesigned and migrated the WebToNative platform from a user-based system to an organization-based multi-tenant architecture for 10,000+ clients.
Developed the frontend for a platform credit and referral rewards system, driving a ~10% increase in new user sign-ups.
Implemented a role-based access control (RBAC) system in the admin dashboard for granular permission management.
Optimized backend database queries and indexing strategies, reducing API response time by 35%.
Built a Cypress-based automation workflow to reduce publishing workflow effort by 70%.
Redesigned the WebToNative checkout experience, achieving a 30% increase in conversion rate.
Built configuration interfaces for multiple WebToNative add-ons, increasing add-on adoption by ~20%.
Enhanced the WebToNative homepage UI/UX with improved visual hierarchy and cross-device responsiveness.
Developed SEO-focused comparison pages, increasing organic traffic by 35%.
Implemented Cypress end-to-end automation for the Android publishing workflow.
